
<HomePage>
List of all products with images, names, prices, and brief descriptions. Category selection and filters based on category.
</HomePage>

<CheckoutPage>
Showing the cart info, a form with phone number, email (optional), full name, address and payment method (cash on delivery only), note field for additional instructions, and a submit button to place the order.
</CheckoutPage>

<ProductDetailsPage>
Showing image gallery, name, price, add to cart, buy now button, detialed description, related products section.
</ProductDetailsPage>

<AdminPanel>
Extend the payload default admin panel with our own layout and customization. Move from a "data management" design to a more "business oriented" design. Add product, category, and order management features (payload defaults are mostly enough for this). Add dashboard with sales overview, recent orders, total orders etc.
</AdminPanel>

<OtherRequirements>
There is no user authentication system for customers.
The website should be mobile-first and adapt to different screen sizes.
Implement basic SEO practices like meta tags, alt attributes for images, and clean URLs.
Performance Optimization: Ensure fast loading times through optimized images and efficient code.
</OtherRequirements>
